---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/DuVanDev
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/duv%C3%A1n-moreno-cardona-767513171/
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/DuVanDev
---

I'm Duván, a Software Engineer building production backend systems.

I'm currently learning AI/ML in public — starting from foundations toward 
applied ML engineering. This blog documents the journey: notes, experiments, 
code, and mistakes.

You can follow my learning progress on [GitHub](https://github.com/DuVanDev/ai-journey).
